subject: iPhone Wi-Fi keeps disconnecting or forgets saved network
description: User reports iPhone drops Wi-Fi every few minutes or saved corporate network disappears from the list after locking the screen.

ts_steps.title: Rejoin
ts_steps.action: Select SSID; enter password; accept captive or 802.1x prompts.

ts_steps.title: VPN off test
ts_steps.action: Disconnect all VPN profiles; retest stability.

ts_steps.title: Private Wi-Fi Address
ts_steps.action: Per-SSID (i) — toggle off temporarily if NAC ties to stable MAC; coordinate with network team.

ts_steps.title: Low Data Mode off
ts_steps.action: Per Wi-Fi SSID details if enabled.

ts_steps.title: Reset Network Settings
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Transfer or Reset → Reset Network Settings — warn wipes Wi-Fi/BT/VPN.

ts_steps.title: Re-pair accessories
ts_steps.action: After reset, re-pair Watch and car Bluetooth.

ts_steps.title: Router band steering
ts_steps.action: If dual SSID 2.4/5 GHz confusion, IT adjusts or user picks stable band.

ts_steps.title: Site-wide check
ts_steps.action: If all devices drop, escalate NOC not phone only.

internal_information: Assist handoff, VPN, private MAC, iOS regression, AP issues.
